NOTE:

In this video, I talk about the importance of getting your tracking date into facebook properly.

Here are some solutions on how to do that:

1. If you use Wordpress and you're using a cart solution like Woofunnels (and you want to track one-click upsells), it's pretty easy.

See here: https://buildwoofunnels.com/docs/funnel-builder/global-settings/tracking-analytics-for-facebook-google/

2. If you're using Wordpress and you're using Woocommerce, go here:
https://woocommerce.com/posts/adapt-for-the-future-with-facebook-conversions-api/

3. If you're using Clickfunnels and you want to track order bumps and one click upsells - and pass those values to Facebook, watch this:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tksx7sZog2c

4. If you're using ANYTHING and you don't need to track conversion values of one-click upsells and order bumps, do this:

Part 1: https://www.loom.com/share/f0cffaea718e463784538a36506914c5

Part 2: https://www.loom.com/share/157a31ad6d024df892bbeb69b2705ca6

5. If you want to be super fancy and use a totally hard core tracking solution, I use Hyros.com
